query: DESCRIBE ai_auto_review_logs; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, isDryRun FROM ai_auto_review_logs GROUP BY isDryRun; SELECT id, aiDecision, aiComment, isDryRun, createdAt FROM ai_auto_review_logs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
